title: ChungusCraft
description: 11/10 discord moderators recommend ChungusCraft to their discord kittens! Download today!
body:
Are you a bot? Do you struggle with navigating a computer despite being a Gen Z individual? Well look no further as ChungusCraft may be right for you! ChungusCraft is a revolutionary new modpack for people who cannot figure out how to open up their %Appdata% folder and want an express install for modpacks and shaders on their gaming potato. Includes clientside performance enchancements and any additonal dependencies required for server playthrough. Side effects may include gooning, stimming, mewing, and rizzing. Ask your discord moderator today if ChungusCraft is a good fit for you!

*Modpack installation is required for chunguscraft.*
